reviews.review_description:
I am lucky enough to one of the first to play this game.
Space Drop has excellent graphics and if you are prone to motion sickness then this game will really suit you.

Blast your way through space in various levels and difficulty settings.

Early doors for me but it’s so much fun to use the twin guns.
Look forward to more action.

This game catapults you into adventure among the stars. The game’s controls are smooth and intuitive, which makes navigating the intricate levels a true pleasure. It’s accessible enough for casual gamers but has enough complexity to keep seasoned players fully engaged. With its pickups as you play, it’s different every time
                                                                                                                                        
With its captivating gameplay, high-quality graphics, and social features trying to top leader boards, it’s the kind of game you can easily get lost in for hours. If you haven’t checked it out yet, don’t wait, your next great adventure is just a download away!
